hero.title: Lycée Ibn Mandour
hero.subtitle: Since 1954, educational excellence in Meknès — an exceptional public school blending tradition and modernity.

values.title: We Believe
values.subtitle: Four core principles that guide every aspect of our school community.

item1.name: Excellence
item1.desc: Academic rigor in service of everyone's success.

item2.name: Integrity
item2.desc: Honesty and respect as life principles.

awards.prefix: That's why, for the 3rd consecutive year
awards.title: #1 in Meknès
awards.subtitle: Best Public High School in the Region
awards.text: Lycée Ibn Mandour has been ranked the best public school in the region by the Ministry of National Education, achieving the highest scores in academic excellence, pedagogical supervision, and infrastructure.

mission.title: Shaping tomorrow's citizens
mission.text1: Our mission is to inspire transformative learning through meaningful relationships, academic excellence, and unique opportunities. With small class sizes, every student is supported, challenged, and valued.
mission.text2: We are committed to creating an environment where every student can reach their full potential, in a rigorous and nurturing learning framework.

honor.title: Honor as a way of life
honor.text: Through our honor code, Lycée Ibn Mandour provides an environment where our community learns to value honesty and respect. Every student and staff member is guided by the belief that honor is a way of life rather than a set of rules to follow.

passions.title: Discover Your Passions
passions.text: Our students have the opportunity to explore their interests and pursue their academic goals while building diverse skills. We believe students should master a broad range of subjects while having the chance to explore multiple opportunities.

sports.title: Sports & Competition
sports.subtitle: Lycée Ibn Mandour is committed to building strong teams in all sports disciplines.
sports.text: With a 72% participation rate among middle and high school students, sports are at the heart of our educational project. Our football, basketball, handball, and athletics teams regularly shine at regional and national competitions.

arts.title: Arts & Creativity
arts.subtitle: At Lycée Ibn Mandour, students have the freedom to explore their imagination.
arts.text: From primary school onward, our students perform on stage and create thoughtful works of art. Our educators are practicing artists who connect students to the arts community through exhibitions and festivals.

academics.title: Academic Excellence
academics.subtitle: We prepare students for higher education by developing critical thinkers and accomplished communicators.
academics.text: Our unique college preparatory program, combined with academic rigor and teacher support, gives students the freedom to personalize their experience and achieve their individual goals.

vision.title: Leaders for a changing world
vision.text: Lycée Ibn Mandour graduates are leaders who excel in a diverse and ever-changing world. Discover our different educational paths.

detail.title: Preschool — A Time of Exploration
detail.text: Preschool is a time of exploration where students develop the social and emotional skills needed for success. We accompany each child in discovering their environment.

detail.title: Primary — Foundations of Success
detail.text: In primary school, students build strong foundations and begin their journey of self-discovery. We offer unique learning opportunities at every stage.

detail.title: Middle School — Building Identity
detail.text: The middle school program is designed to give students the freedom to explore their interests while developing the study and organizational skills needed for success.

detail.title: High School — Aiming for Excellence
detail.text: High school students have the opportunity to explore their interests and pursue their academic goals to prepare for future success in higher education.

admission.title: Join Lycée Ibn Mandour
admission.text: Enrollment for the 2026-2027 school year is now open. Join an exceptional educational community where every student is known, supported, and inspired to give their best.

item1.title: 2026 Baccalaureate Results
item1.desc: Congratulations to all our graduates for their excellent 99% success rate.

item2.title: Open House Day
item2.desc: Come discover our school and meet our teaching staff.

item3.title: 2026-2027 Enrollment
item3.desc: Enrollment for the upcoming school year is now open.

item1.text: An exceptional environment where my child thrives. The teachers are dedicated and attentive.
item1.name: Mrs. El Amrani

item2.text: Lycée Ibn Mandour prepared me for the best higher education. An unforgettable experience.
item2.name: Omar B.

item3.text: Passionate teachers and personalized support that makes all the difference.

footer.description: Lycée Ibn Mandour — Educational excellence in Meknès since 1954.
footer.quote: « Shaping tomorrow's citizens is preparing a better future for all. »
